# S021. Jump Filter + Momentum Engine

## Positioning

This candidate is a momentum engine with a jump filter in front of it. The point is to stay out of the market when the path assumptions are broken and only let momentum breathe when the jump risk is manageable.

## Reference Basis

- [Bayesian Online Changepoint Detection](../../references/papers/0710.3742_bayesian_online_changepoint_detection.pdf) - change-point detector for jump-risk gating
- [Parameter Estimation of the Heston Volatility Model with Jumps in the Asset Prices](../../references/papers/2211.14814_heston_jumps.pdf) - jump-risk and volatility reference

## Repo Anchors

### Operational Guardrails

Shared safety and execution rails used by every candidate before a signal can touch capital.
- [src/risk/manager.py](../../../src/risk/manager.py) - pre-trade risk gate and position haircut
- [src/brokers/paper.py](../../../src/brokers/paper.py) - paper-safe broker adapter
- [src/monitoring/health.py](../../../src/monitoring/health.py) - freshness, heartbeat, and kill-switch checks
- [src/backtest/engine.py](../../../src/backtest/engine.py) - deterministic offline backtest runner
- [src/backtest/matching_engine.py](../../../src/backtest/matching_engine.py) - queue-aware synthetic fill model
- [scripts/monitor_health.py](../../../scripts/monitor_health.py) - runtime health loop and stale-data monitor

### HFT and Intraday Stack

Replay-backed intraday ingestion and synthetic matching for jump filters and short-horizon routing.
- [src/ingestion/websocket_client.py](../../../src/ingestion/websocket_client.py) - stream/replay event ingestion
- [src/backtest/matching_engine.py](../../../src/backtest/matching_engine.py) - intraday queue-aware matching
- [scripts/monitor_health.py](../../../scripts/monitor_health.py) - stream freshness and heartbeat supervision

### Market Data and Features

Point-in-time data loading plus the shared feature builder used by most signal stacks.
- [src/ingestion/loader.py](../../../src/ingestion/loader.py) - point-in-time market data loading
- [src/features/builder.py](../../../src/features/builder.py) - technical, lagged, and derived feature construction

## Data / Feature Bundle

- Use gap features, realized-volatility spikes, and price momentum from the shared feature builder.
- Replay intraday or end-of-day bars through the same ingestion path so the filter can be tested in both modes.
- Keep the market data clean enough that the jump filter is reacting to jumps, not to stale samples.

## Execution Path

- Allow momentum trades only when jump risk stays below the threshold.
- Run the momentum leg through queue-aware synthetic fills when the trade is intraday.
- Use the health loop to freeze the engine whenever stream freshness breaks.

## Risk Controls

- Be conservative when the market transitions into a jump regime; the engine should prefer flat over forced exposure.
- Avoid re-entering too quickly after a jump cluster.
- Let the risk manager override the momentum signal whenever drawdown or stale-data checks fail.

## Validation Gates

- Measure how much drawdown the jump filter removes on stressed sessions compared with raw momentum.
- Check whether the filter degrades normal-period performance less than a naive volatility spike rule.
- Run the captured replay fixture and verify the engine does not oscillate around the threshold.

## Archive Triggers

- Archive if the filter removes more alpha than it saves in risk.
- Archive if jump detection is not better than a simple range-break rule.
- Archive if the model cannot be replayed deterministically.

## Next Step

Use it as the crash-aware momentum template for F027 and any future intraday trend stack.
